title: SGR Debt Service Payment Overdue
message: KRC has missed the October 2024 SGR loan repayment instalment of KES 8.2 billion to Exim Bank of China. Immediate escalation to National Treasury required.

title: Q3 Financial Report Submission Overdue
message: Kenya Airways Q3 FY2024 financial report was due on 15 October 2024. Report not yet submitted to National Treasury as required under PFM Act 2012.

title: Olkaria VI Drilling Phase 1 Complete
message: KenGen has successfully completed Phase 1 drilling at Olkaria VI, confirming 85 MW of geothermal resource. Phase 2 drilling to commence January 2025.

title: System Losses Above Target
message: KPLC system losses for Q2 FY2024 stand at 21.5%, above the 20% quarterly target. Smart meter rollout acceleration required to meet year-end target of 19%.

title: Mombasa Port Throughput Record
message: KPA achieved a record monthly container throughput of 145,000 TEUs in September 2024, surpassing the previous record of 138,000 TEUs set in March 2024.

title: Pipeline Integrity Alert — Nairobi Section
message: Routine inspection detected corrosion on a 2.5 km section of the Nairobi–Eldoret pipeline near Nakuru. Maintenance team deployed; throughput reduced by 15% as precaution.

title: Annual Report Submission Deadline
message: KBC annual report for FY2023 is overdue. Submission to National Treasury required within 14 days to avoid sanctions under State Corporations Act Cap 446.

title: New Nairobi–Mumbai Route Launch
message: Kenya Airways has launched a new direct route between Nairobi (JKIA) and Mumbai (BOM) effective 1 November 2024, operating 4 times weekly on Boeing 787-8.
